title: Thriden upgrade payload manifest (Mongo collection shape, Phase 3)
description: Document shape for the `personaforge.deploy_payloads` collection consumed by `bin/thriden-deploy-payload.sh -i <_id>`. Extends `deploy-payload.schema.json` (Phase 1 input shape) with wrapper-managed and PF-managed fields. Applied as the collection validator by `bin/thriden-deploy-payloads-setup.sh`. See docs/design-upgrade-at-wake.md.

_id.description: Mongo ObjectId. Auto-generated unless PF explicitly sets one.

thriden_version.description: Human-meaningful label for this bundle. Mirrors the Phase 1 input field; not load-bearing.

components.description: Map of logical component name to image tag. Same constraint as the Phase 1 input schema. Mongo's $jsonSchema doesn't support propertyNames, so the per-key constraint is unrolled into explicit properties + additionalProperties: false.

ordering.description: Swap + smoke order. Rollback runs in reverse. Same constraint as Phase 1.

status.description: Payload state machine. PF writes documents with status: pending; the wrapper transitions through in_progress to one of the terminal states. cancelled is operator-set via mongosh to take a pending payload out of the running.

written_by.description: Operator identifier from the Forge UI session that scheduled the payload.

created_at.description: When PF wrote the payload to Mongo.

claimed_by_scion.description: Set by the wrapper at claim time (atomic findOneAndUpdate from pending → in_progress). The scion short name (e.g. 'helix'). Distinguishes which scion's orchestrator picked the payload up if multiple are scoped.

triggered_at.description: Set at claim time alongside claimed_by_scion.

completed_at.description: Set when the wrapper last calls finalize(). For the normal terminal states (succeeded / rolled_back / failed) this marks genuine completion. For the crash-exit path the wrapper calls finalize(in_progress), so completed_at present with status=in_progress is the sentinel that the wrapper died mid-run and the doc is awaiting manual review — it does NOT mean the payload finished successfully.

pre_flight_backups.description: Per-scion paths to the pre-flight /admin/export snapshots. Keyed by scion short name; values are absolute paths on the host (under /srv/thriden/backups/<scion>/).

original_tags.description: Per-component image tag values captured before the pin step, so a wrapper rollback can revert deterministically.

failure_kind.description: Wrapper sets this at top level on certain failure paths (legacy from Phase 1 file mode). Mirror of result.failure_kind for callers that don't traverse the nested object.

failed_component.description: Top-level mirror of result.failed_component (same Phase 1 legacy reason).

succeeded_components.description: Top-level mirror of result.succeeded_components (same Phase 1 legacy reason).

logs.description: Append-only log of wrapper progress. Each entry is pushed by the wrapper's log() helper.
